libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system-property setup is required. If tests exercise org.eclipse.sisu.space.QualifiedTypeBinder on 2.4.2, use hear(Class, Object), not the older three-argument hear(null, Class, Object) form.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8718 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.2; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact declares optional integrations for JUnit 4/TestNG, OSGi, and SLF4J; do not add those unless the generated tests intentionally target those optional integration classes.
The library is an old deprecated legacy wrapper around Eclipse Sisu/Guice APIs, so API drift between existing 2.4.0 tests and 2.4.2 is the main compile risk.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed for meaningful in-process Sisu/Guice coverage; the observed javac failure is a stale test API call against the 2.4.1+/2.4.2 QualifiedTypeBinder signature.
